response: Emily collected 24 blueberries. David collected 15 more blueberries than Emily and three times as many as Sophia. They used their blueberries to make muffins. One batch of muffins required 9 blueberries and they sold each batch for $5. They made 24 blueberries from Emily, 15 more from David, and 3 times as many from Sophia. David collected 24 + 15 = 39 blueberries. Sophia collected 13 blueberries. They collected a total of 24 + 39 + 13 = 76 blueberries. They made 76 / 9 = 8 batches of muffins.
